name: Making It Easy Golf LLC
about: Making It Easy Golf LLC is a golf training facility specializing in simplifying the game for players of all skill levels. They offer personalized coaching, mobile services, and on-course guidance using advanced technology like Trackman and Foresight systems for swing analysis and club fitting. Their Sarasota location provides an indoor environment for practice and learning, featuring amenities such as an indoor bunker and professional-grade launch monitors. The facility is focused on providing stress-free instruction and practice, with packages ranging from $500 to $2500 for lesson plans.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium technology including Trackman and Foresight launch monitors for precise swing analysis
Personalized coaching with over 15,000 lessons taught and a focus on simplifying the game
Comprehensive services including club fitting, putting lab, and on-course guidance available

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service available
No mention of alcohol service available

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor for swing analysis
Golf simulator system for practice and play
Ground force plate system for swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The facility offers club rentals and professional club fitting services, so you don't necessarily need to bring your own clubs. However, you can bring your own if you prefer.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of BYOB policies or food service on-site. It's recommended to contact the facility directly for specific policies outside drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The facility focuses on practice and instruction rather than full 18-hole simulations. Swing assessments and lessons are typically one hour in duration.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific mention of junior programs or kid-friendly amenities on the website. It's recommended to contact the facility directly for information about youth programs.
